title: Gen AI · Memory & Chat
subtitle: Branch 6 — follow-ups, history list, demo vs REPL

nodes.label: NEED · RAG running
nodes.definition: ConversationalRetrievalChain still retrieves from Chroma each turn — memory does not replace retrieval.
nodes.whyItMatters: Turn 3 “aim of it” needs both: prior Q/A in history AND policy chunks from the retriever.
nodes.safeSentence: Memory = what we already said; RAG = what the document says.

nodes.label: NEED · Chroma in-memory
nodes.definition: M1 uses build_chroma_from_txt — no persist_directory yet.
nodes.whyItMatters: Every memory script imports the same shared ingest you liked.
nodes.safeSentence: Open Chroma map → In-memory bubble → m1_rag_shared.

nodes.label: INGREDIENT · history list
nodes.definition: history: list[tuple[str,str]] — append (query, answer) after each invoke; pass as chat_history.
nodes.whyItMatters: The pattern you understood in 04 vs 07: storing turns is what makes follow-ups work.
nodes.safeSentence: Same list whether questions come from TURNS or from input().

note.summary:
result = chain.invoke({"question": query, "chat_history": history})
history.append((query, answer))

nodes.label: RECIPE · Demo (fixed turns)
nodes.definition: Scripted TURNS list — proves follow-ups without you typing.
nodes.whyItMatters: Run this first in one session; REPL second.

nodes.label: RECIPE · REPL (you type)
nodes.definition: while True + input() until quit/exit/bye — same chain and history as 04.
nodes.whyItMatters: This is the one you ran happy with “aim of it”.

nodes.label: NEXT · Gradio wrap
nodes.definition: Same chain, browser UI instead of terminal — M2.

nodes.label: CRS 001 · LCEL memory labs
nodes.definition: MessagesPlaceholder, RunnableWithMessageHistory — same idea, no retrieval.
nodes.whyItMatters: When memory chat is NOT over docs, use CRS 001 path instead of this map.

paths.label: Recipe lane · Memory chat over docs
paths.description: Click NEED bubbles first, then RECIPE demo → REPL.
